issues.description: Counter trigger should have single conditional action sequence. First PowerBoost (+4000) is correct, but second PowerBoost (+2000) must be conditional on TrashCount >= 10, not unconditional. Current structure applies both boosts always.
Extraneous second effect with Trigger and +1000 PowerBoost has no basis in card text. Should be removed entirely.
Missing condition: TrashCount >= 10 required before applying second +2000 boost. Condition must gate this action.
Both PowerBoost actions target same card (ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader) but second boost should only apply if condition met. Needs conditional logic structure.
